questions.question:
A Deployment named `batch-api` in namespace `priority-lab` is failing because its PriorityClass wiring is wrong.

Fix the workload so that:
- it uses PriorityClass `ops-critical`
- the existing PriorityClass keeps value `100000`
- the existing PriorityClass keeps `preemptionPolicy: Never`
- the Deployment becomes Available
- the running Pod uses PriorityClass `ops-critical`

Do not create a replacement PriorityClass. Fix the Deployment to use the existing one.

verification.description: Deployment batch-api uses the intended PriorityClass and the existing PriorityClass value and preemption policy remain correct
Deployment batch-api becomes Available after the PriorityClass wiring is repaired
The running Pod uses PriorityClass ops-critical with the expected numeric priority
